positions.thesis: Cash equivalent — dry powder for volatility. Deploy via Wednesday limit orders if market declines 3-5%.
positions.variant_perception: Dry powder for volatility — deploy via Wednesday limit orders if market declines 3-5%

positions.thesis: Market prices it as AI hype; actually 60% recurring software revenue from VMware with $25B FCF.
positions.invalidation: ASIC demand slows. VMware integration struggles. Hyperscaler insourcing accelerates.
positions.variant_perception: Market prices it as AI hype; actually 60% recurring software revenue from VMware with $25B FCF

positions.thesis: Market fears antitrust breakup; AI integration is actually strengthening search monopoly.
positions.invalidation: DOJ breakup accelerates. Gemini revenue contribution <$2B. Search revenue declines YoY.
positions.variant_perception: Market fears antitrust breakup; AI integration is actually strengthening search monopoly

positions.thesis: TRIMMED from 10% — credit-sensitive exposure reduced for war scenario; floating rate thesis intact.
positions.invalidation: Net inflows turn negative. 10Y Treasury >5%. Private market valuations correct 20%+.
positions.variant_perception: Market sees it as rate-sensitive value trap; floating rate exposure actually benefits from higher rates
positions.war_adjustment: Reduced from 10% to 5% due to credit spread sensitivity

positions.thesis: Market sees Medicare Advantage headwinds; demographic tailwinds and pricing power dominate.
positions.invalidation: MA rate cuts >2%. DOJ antitrust investigation announced. Medical costs spike 300bps above guidance.
positions.variant_perception: Market sees Medicare Advantage headwinds; demographic tailwinds and pricing power dominate

positions.thesis: NEW POSITION — Energy hedge for Strait of Hormuz closure risk; oil at $108 could go $130-150.
positions.invalidation: Peace deal collapses oil. Strait stays open. Global recession crushes demand.
positions.variant_perception: Market pricing 2-week disruption; actual Hormuz closure would be 2-6 month event

positions.thesis: Market ignores protein nutrition; 91% DCF upside, 9x EBITDA vs peers at 20x.
positions.invalidation: Consumer shift away from protein. Input cost spike. Competitive moat erodes.
positions.variant_perception: Market ignores protein nutrition; 91% DCF upside, 9x EBITDA vs peers at 20x

positions.thesis: Market penalizes negative EBITDA; actually $1.5B FCF with 26% margins and sticky enterprise moat.
positions.invalidation: Enterprise churn accelerates. GitHub Copilot disrupts dev tools. Cloud growth stalls.
positions.variant_perception: Market penalizes negative EBITDA; actually $1.5B FCF with 26% margins and sticky enterprise moat

positions.thesis: Market treats as small-cap noise; Swiss sports data monopoly with 47% growth and net cash.
positions.invalidation: Sports betting regulation tightens. Major league data deal lost. Growth decelerates.
positions.variant_perception: Market treats as small-cap noise; Swiss sports data monopoly with 47% growth and net cash

positions.thesis: Market fears biotech; dominant narcolepsy drug at 4.5x EBITDA vs peers at 11x.
positions.invalidation: Generic competition emerges. FDA issues. Pipeline failures.
positions.variant_perception: Market fears biotech; dominant narcolepsy drug at 4.5x EBITDA vs peers at 11x

positions.thesis: War premium — gold hedges currency debasement AND geopolitical risk.
positions.invalidation: Peace deal. Fed hawkishness crushes inflation expectations. Dollar surge.
positions.variant_perception: Market complacent on fiscal sustainability; gold hedges against currency debasement and geopolitical risk
positions.war_adjustment: Target raised to $550 for war premium

positions.thesis: Flight to safety bid offsets inflation concern; Fed will cut if war causes recession.
positions.invalidation: Inflation spikes. Fed stays hawkish despite war. 10Y yields break 5%.
positions.variant_perception: Market expects rates stay high; jobs miss signals recession, Fed will cut aggressively

positions.thesis: Market hasn't fully priced HDD obsolescence; AI workloads demand SSDs, Seagate losing share.
positions.invalidation: AI storage demand accelerates HDD. Hyperscaler orders surge. Acquisition at premium.
positions.variant_perception: Market hasn't fully priced HDD obsolescence; AI workloads demand SSDs, Seagate losing share

positions.thesis: NEW SHORT — Small-caps most vulnerable to war-driven rate uncertainty, credit tightening, liquidity crunch.
positions.invalidation: Fed pivot. Peace deal. Risk-on rotation to small-caps.
positions.variant_perception: Market expects rotation to small-caps when Fed cuts; war means Fed stays higher longer, IWM gets crushed
